name: Aspecto
description: Aspecto — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in APM.

seo.title: Aspecto Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Aspecto analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Best for automated build/test/deploy pipelines. Aspecto offers custom pricing.
pros: Deep integrations across the observability stack
cons: Per-host / per-seat billing grows fast with team size
